LoginPage.title: Welcome back
LoginPage.subTitle: Log in to continue studying, review your decks, and pick up where you left off.

RegisterPage.title: Create your account
RegisterPage.subTitle: Start generating decks from your study material and review them in a focused workspace.

hero.title: Turn PDFs into AI-powered flashcards in seconds
hero.subtitle: Upload any document and let AI generate smart study cards. Study smarter, retain more, and ace your exams with personalized flashcard decks.

features.title: Everything you need to study smarter
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed to transform how you learn and retain information.

aiGeneration.title: AI-Powered Generation
aiGeneration.description: Upload a PDF and our AI instantly creates comprehensive flashcard decks, extracting key concepts and generating smart questions.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLanguage.description: Study in your preferred language. Our AI generates cards in multiple languages, making learning accessible to everyone.

smartSessions.title: Smart Study Sessions
smartSessions.description: Interactive study sessions with instant feedback. Track correct and wrong answers to focus on what matters most.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Monitor your learning journey with detailed progress bars, completion rates, and performance summaries after each session.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From document to study-ready flashcards in three simple steps.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Upload your document
step1.description: Drop any PDF — lecture notes, textbooks, research papers. Our system handles the rest.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: AI generates your deck
step2.description: Our AI analyzes the content, extracts key concepts, and creates smart flashcards with questions and multiple-choice answers.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Study and master
step3.description: Go through your personalized deck, get instant feedback, track your progress, and review your results.

demo.title: Try it yourself
demo.subtitle: Experience a sample study session right here. No signup required.

decks.title: Your decks, beautifully organized
decks.subtitle: Every deck you create is stored and ready for review. Here's what they look like.

testimonials.title: Loved by early testers
testimonials.subtitle: Here's what our beta users have to say about StudyCards.

t1.quote: I uploaded my 80-page biology notes and had a complete study deck in under a minute. This is incredible.
t1.name: Maria Ionescu

t2.quote: The AI-generated questions are surprisingly accurate. It caught nuances in my law textbook that I would have missed.
t2.name: Andrei Popescu

t3.quote: I used to spend hours making flashcards manually. Now I upload a PDF and study in minutes. Game changer.
t3.name: Elena Dumitrescu

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when you need more.

finalCta.title: Ready to study smarter?
finalCta.subtitle: Join students who are already transforming their study habits with AI-powered flashcards.
